description.en: Integration to control a Trinnov Altitude Processor.

value.en: By clicking Next, the driver will automatically discover Trinnov Altitude Processors on your local network. The Trinnov must be powered on and connected to the same network for discovery to succeed. If multiple devices are found, you will be asked to select which processor to use. If no device is found, this indicates a network configuration issue that must be resolved before continuing.
